title: remind me tomorrow to request a flag to be flown over the US Capitol
latest_user_text: remind me tomorrow to request a flag to be flown over the US Capitol
latest_assistant_text:
I can prepare that reminder, but I can’t actually schedule it from here without a calendar/reminder tool connected.

What I’ve got from you is: tomorrow, remind Chris to request a flag to be flown over the U.S. Capitol.
